allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ids=set\(\); unique=[p for p in d['products'] if p['id'] not in ids and not ids.add\(p['id']\)]; print\(f'Total unique products: {len\(unique\)}'\); cats={}; [cats.__setitem__\(p['category'], cats.get\(p['category'],0\)+1\) for p in unique]; [print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\) for k,v in cats.items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'상품 수: {len\(d.get\(\\"products\\", []\)\)}'\); [print\(f' - {p[\\"name\\"][:30]} | ₩{p[\\"price\\"]:,}'\) for p in d.get\('products', []\)[:10]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('success'\), d.get\('product',{}\).get\('name','없음'\)[:30] if d.get\('product'\) else d.get\('error','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('✅' if d.get\('success'\) else '❌', d.get\('product',{}\).get\('name',''\)[:30] if d.get\('product'\) else d.get\('error'\)\)")
